Canonical Manifest command dispatcher (runManifestCommand/executeManifestCommand). Static audit greps for runCommand() literal only — false positive for COMMAND_ROUTE_MISSING_RUNTIME_CALL and COMMAND_ROUTE_ORPHAN. Drain: teach audit to recognize runManifestCommand wrappers; keep dispatcher as infrastructure.

Custom kitchen prep-list create orchestration: Manifest constraint evaluation plus composite persistence (see custom-command-routes-allowlist.ts). Audit greps for runCommand() literal; this route uses createPrepList helpers. Drain: collapse to generated command route or add runCommand wrapper.
